RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Remembering [region]The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong[/region] a small, fledgling, frontier colony of [region]Empire of Great Britain[/region], which became embattled in late 2023 as barbarous forces from beyond the region’s borders invaded and took control of the region,
Recognizing that during this period of instability and strife, this esteemed council passed a liberation to preserve the region and its community,
Understanding that following the invasion, the community of The Crown Dependency disbanded and its nations returned back to their mother region which chose other avenues for developing its community and pursuing growth in the frontiers,
Acknowledging that the liberation has outlived its original purpose, and now acts as a barrier preventing its former community from reclaiming the space and protecting it,
Seeking to allow the former community to reclaim and preserve their former home,
Repeals Liberate The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong.
RESOLUTION.NAME: Repeal "Liberate The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong"
